steps.title: Substitute x = -1 into f(x)
steps.content: Substitute -1 for x in the definition: $$f(-1)=(-1)^3+3(-1)^2-6(-1)-1$$.

steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content:
Compute each term: $$(-1)^3 = -1$$, $$3(-1)^2 = 3$$, $$-6(-1)=6$$, and the constant term is $$-1$$. Add them: $$-1+3+6-1 = 7$$.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
